methods.method_name: Sediment Core Collection and Initial Processing
methods.description: Process for collecting sediment cores from a lake and preparing them for laboratory analysis to study sedimentological, geochemical, and paleoecological characteristics.

steps.description: Two sediment cores were collected from different sites in the lake, using a gravity corer.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores from lake using gravity corer

steps.description: A 121-cm-long core was collected from the central part of the lake during a 2011 field campaign (TOC 11-04, 68 m water depth).
steps.searchable_summary: collect 121-cm sediment core from central lake

steps.description: The second core is 135 cm long, and was recovered from a sub-aquatic prodelta near the southeastern shore (TRGC 14-06, 29.4 m water depth), during field work in 2014.
steps.searchable_summary: collect 135-cm sediment core from prodelta near southeastern shore

steps.description: Core TOC 11-04 was transported to the laboratory of the Physical Geography Department of the Friedrich-Schiller-University Jena, Germany, where it was stored under dark and cool (? 4°C) conditions prior to processing.
steps.searchable_summary: transport and store sediment core under dark and cool conditions

steps.description: The core was split lengthwise, photographed and the sediments were described according to standard protocols.
steps.searchable_summary: split, photograph, and describe sediment core

steps.description: Core TRGC 14-06 was treated similarly at the Institute of Tibetan Plateau Research, Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing.
steps.searchable_summary: process sediment core at Institute of Tibetan Plateau Research

steps.description: Sediment cores were analyzed for sedimentological and geochemical characteristics (grain size, organic and inorganic carbon, elemental concentrations) and paleoecological bioindicators (chironomids, diatoms, pollen).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sediment cores for sedimentological, geochemical, and paleoecological characteristics
